In the house next to Saturn the Sun, Venus and Mercury are posited. He
will get a decentjob, earn well, have conveyances and servants and live a
harmonious life. The wife of the native will, however, suffer from some
serious disease. This can be overcome· by pilgrimage to Hardwar :or
Rameswarain. When Saturn transits Libra the mother will suffer ill-health.
